childNames: The total shopping value found in your account is the estimated amount you can spend using Atome. This amount is not guaranteed and may change based on a variety of factors such as the frequency you use Atome and your repayment history. In addition to your individual spending limit, there may be additional limitations based on the merchant where you are shopping.
